message:
feat(firecracker): create metrics FIFO during VM creation

Create a named pipe (FIFO) for Firecracker metrics and configure it via
the SetMetrics API before starting the instance. This enables the daemon
to read real-time metrics from running VMs.

- Add MetricsPath field to VMInfo struct
- Create metrics.fifo in VM state directory in CreateVM and StartVM
- Call SetMetrics API to configure Firecracker to write metrics to FIFO
- Metrics configuration failures are warnings only (non-fatal)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,6 +95,7 @@ type VMInfo struct {
 	SocketPath    string // Console socket path
 	APISocketPath string // HTTP API socket path
 	RootfsPath    string
+	MetricsPath   string // Path to metrics FIFO
 	State         string
 	CreatedAt     time.Time
 }
